/* === Template 12 Portal Form === */
.portal-form-wrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
.portal-row { display: flex; gap: 16px; }
.portal-row > .portal-half { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.portal-full { width: 100%; }
.portal-field input,
.portal-field select {
  width: 100%;
  height: 48px;
  padding: 0 12px;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 48px;
  border: 1px solid #8c8c8c;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: Delivery, Verdana, sans-serif;
  color: #333;
  background: #fff;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color 0.15s;
}
.portal-field input:focus,
.portal-field select:focus {
  border-color: #0056a2;
  border-width: 2px;
}
.portal-field input::placeholder {
  color: #8c8c8c;
  font-size: 16px;
  opacity: 1;
}
.portal-field select {
  appearance: auto;
  -webkit-appearance: auto;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.portal-field select:invalid {
  color: #8c8c8c;
}
.portal-field select option {
  color: #333;
}
.portal-field select option:disabled {
  color: #8c8c8c;
}

/* === 3-Step Indicator Fixes === */
.sc-a0d4f61e-0.jleSta { gap: 40px; }
.sc-a0d4f61e-3.hxWmwJ,
.sc-a0d4f61e-3.hNXTrP { width: 110px; font-size: 13px; }
.sc-a0d4f61e-4.cVyzyX { width: 80px; left: 60px; }
/* Done step (checkmark, green bg) */
.step-done { background-color: #4caf50 !important; border: none !important; color: #fff !important; }

/* === Portal Step Indicator === */
.sc-a0d4f61e-0 { display: none !important; }
.portal-steps {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto 28px;
  padding: 0 10px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.portal-step {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  min-width: 90px;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(8px);
  animation: stepFadeIn 0.5s ease forwards;
}
.portal-step:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
.portal-step:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.portal-step:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.5s; }
@keyframes stepFadeIn {
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

/* Circle */
.portal-step-circle {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.portal-step-circle.active {
  background: #333;
  color: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(51, 51, 51, 0.15);
}
.portal-step-circle.done {
  background: #4caf50;
  color: #fff;
}
.portal-step-circle.upcoming {
  background: #fff;
  color: #999;
  border: 2px solid #ddd;
}

/* Label */
.portal-step-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #555;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 8px;
  line-height: 1.3;
  max-width: 110px;
  font-family: Delivery, Verdana, sans-serif;
}
.portal-step.active .portal-step-label { color: #333; font-weight: 700; }
.portal-step.done .portal-step-label { color: #4caf50; }
.portal-step.upcoming .portal-step-label { color: #bbb; }

/* Connector line */
.portal-step-line {
  flex: 1;
  height: 3px;
  min-width: 40px;
  max-width: 80px;
  background: #e5e5e5;
  margin-top: 19px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: lineFadeIn 0.4s ease forwards;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.portal-step-line:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
.portal-step-line:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
@keyframes lineFadeIn {
  to { opacity: 1; }
}
.portal-step-line.done {
  background: #4caf50;
}
.portal-step-line.done::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; bottom: 0;
  width: 100%;
  background: #4caf50;
  animation: lineGrow 0.6s ease forwards;
  animation-delay: 0.3s;
  transform-origin: left;
  transform: scaleX(0);
}
@keyframes lineGrow {
  to { transform: scaleX(1); }
}

/* === Form Field Labels & Spacing === */
.portal-form-wrapper {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  gap: 20px !important;
}
.portal-row {
  gap: 16px !important;
}
.portal-field {
  position: relative;
}
.portal-field label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #374151;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  font-family: Delivery, Verdana, sans-serif;
}
.portal-field input,
.portal-field select {
  height: 48px !important;
  padding: 0 14px !important;
  font-size: 15px !important;
  border: 1.5px solid #d1d5db !important;
  border-radius: 8px !important;
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease !important;
}
.portal-field input:focus,
.portal-field select:focus {
  border-color: #d40511 !important;
  border-width: 1.5px !important;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(212, 5, 17, 0.08) !important;
}
.portal-field input::placeholder {
  color: #9ca3af !important;
}
/* Card wrapper breathing room */
.sc-63900b0f-1 {
  padding: 10px 0 !important;
}
/* Heading spacing */
.sc-ac4a4da6-5 {
  margin-bottom: 24px !important;
}

/* === CTA Button === */
.portal-cta-btn {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 15px;
  margin-top: 10px;
  background: #d40511;
  color: #fff !important;
  font-size: 17px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-align: center;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  cursor: pointer;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: Delivery, Verdana, sans-serif;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s;
}
.portal-cta-btn:hover {
  background: #b00410;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.portal-cta-btn:active {
  transform: translateY(0);
}

/* === Waiting Page === */
/* Hide step indicator and card content */
.portal-steps { display: none !important; }
.sc-ac4a4da6-11 {
  min-height: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.sc-79fe9a9-0 {
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  border: none !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}
.sc-ac4a4da6-11 > * {
  display: none !important;
}

/* Full screen overlay */
.wait-overlay {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
  z-index: 9999;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  padding-top: 140px;
}
#lottie-lorry {
  width: 180px;
  height: 180px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.wait-label {
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 17px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-family: Delivery, Verdana, sans-serif;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  margin: 0 0 18px;
  text-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
  opacity: 0;
  animation: wFade 0.6s ease forwards 0.4s;
}
@keyframes wFade { to { opacity: 1; } }
.wait-dots {
  display: flex;
  gap: 7px;
}
.wd {
  width: 7px; height: 7px;
  background: #FFCC00;
  border-radius: 50%;
  animation: wBounce 1.4s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.wd:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; }

            #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-host-item > button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-ven-item > button:focus {
                border: 1px solid #FFFFFF;
            }
            #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk *:focus,
            #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-vlst-cntr > a:focus {
               outline: 1px solid #FFFFFF;

#onetrust-banner-sdk{
    font-family: Delivery,Verdana,sans-serif !important;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-plus-minus span  {
background-color: #ccc;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk {
    font-family: DeliveryRegular,sans-serif;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk .category-vendors-list-handler, #onetrust-pc-sdk .category-host-list-handler:hover {
    color: #F91320 !important;
    margin-left: 0;
    font-size: .75em;
    text-decoration: none;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk a {
    background-color: transparent;
    decoration:none !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk a:hover {
    background-color: transparent;
    color: #F91320 !important;
    decoration:none !important;
}


#onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link {
    background-color: transparent;
    color: #D40511 !important;
    decoration:none;
}

#onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link:hover {
    background-color: transparent; 
    color: #F91320 !important;
    decoration:none;
}

#onetrust-accept-btn-handler {
    font-family: Delivery,Verdana,sans-serif !important;
    color: #ffffff;
    border: 1px solid #d40511;
    background-color: #d40511;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    margin: 0 0 1.4rem;
    padding: 0 1.54rem;
    -webkit-box-align: center;
    align-items: center;
    vertical-align: middle;
    letter-spacing: normal;
    min-height: 4.2rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    -webkit-box-pack: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    margin-left: 10px;  
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk button:hover {
    background-color: transparent;
    border-color: transparent;
    color: #FFFFFF;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .button-theme:hover {
background-color: #F91320;
    border-color: #F91320;
    color: #FFFFFF;
}


#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk .accordion-text, #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk .accordion-text .cookie-subgroup-toggle .ot-switch.toggle {
    background-color: #333333 !important;
}

/* Hide 'Allow All' on Host level */
#onetrust-pc-sdk #select-all-container .ot-checkbox {
    display: none;
}
/* Color Always Active */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-vs-list .ot-always-active, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-cat-grp .ot-always-active{
    font-size: .88em;
    line-height: 1.4;
    position: relative;
    top: 5px;
    color: #d40511;
    }

/* Color Optin Toggle active */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .switch-checkbox:checked+.ot-switch-label {
    transition: all .2s ease-in 0s;
    -moz-transition: all .2s ease-in 0s;
    -o-transition: all .2s ease-in 0s;
    -webkit-transition: all .2s ease-in 0s;
    border: 1px solid #D40511;
}


/* Color Optin Toggle */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-tgl input:checked+.ot-switch .ot-switch-nob:before {
    background-color: #F91320;
}

/*#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-tgl input:focus+.ot-switch .ot-switch-nob {
outline-style: none !important;
border: none !important;
}*/

#onetrust-pc-sdk .host-option-group .vendor-host {
    border: none;
    font-size: .8em;
    color: #333333 !important;
    display: inline-block;
    width: calc(100% - 20px);
    padding: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    background-color: #f8f8f8;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-pc-footer-logo {
    display: inline-block;
    width: calc(100% - 15px);
    margin-right: 15px;
    margin-top: 15px;
    display: none;
}

/*#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-ven-item>button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-host-item>button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-accordion-layout.ot-cat-item>button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-acc-cntr>button:focus,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk *:focus, #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-vlst-cntr > a:focus {
outline: none !important;
}*/
#onetrust-consent-sdk .privacy-notice-link {
    display: inline-block !important;
    margin-right: 20px;
}
#onetrust-banner-sdk a:hover, #onetrust-pc-sdk a:hover, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy a:hover {
color: red !important;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk button.onetrust-vendors-list-handler {
text-decoration: underline;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk button.onetrust-vendors-list-handler:hover {
color: red !important;
}

#ot-sdk-cookie-policy a {
text-decoration: none;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .category-vendors-list-handler, #onetrust-pc-sdk .category-host-list-handler:hover {
font-size: .813em !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-button:focus, #onetrust-banner-sdk :not(.ot-leg-btn-container)>button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-sdk-button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk :not(.ot-leg-btn-container)>button:focus, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy .ot-sdk-button:focus, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy :not(.ot-leg-btn-container)>button:focus {
outline: none !important;
}


/* scroll change start */
@media screen and (max-width: 600px) {
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-pc-footer {
position: relative;
border-top: none;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk {
overflow-y: scroll;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-pc-content, #onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-pc-lst {
    position: relative;
    top: 0;
    overflow: visible;
    height: calc(100% - 175px);
    overflow-y: scroll;
}
}
/* scroll change end */

.ot-floating-button {
display: none;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-pc-content.ot-pc-scrollbar {
    bottom: 62px;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-btn-container button {
    margin-top: 7px;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-pc-logo {
    height: 22px;
    width: auto;    
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk #close-pc-btn-handler.ot-close-icon {
        top: 0;
}

/* express-resources.dhl.com fix start*/
li.ot-host-item {
display: inherit !important;
}
li.ot-host-item:after,
li.ot-host-info:after{
display: none;
}

#ot-pc-desc a {
text-decoration: underline !important;
}
#ot-pc-desc a:hover {
text-decoration: none !important;
}

/* express-resources.dhl.com fix end */

/* dhl.com fixes start */
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href], #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href] font, #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-link-btn {

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler, #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler {
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}
/* dhl.com fixes end */

#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-pc-header {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk #accept-recommended-btn-handler {
margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

@media screen and (min-width: 477px) {
#onetrust-pc-sdk.ot-ftr-stacked .ot-pc-footer button {
    width: initial !important;
}
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-tgl input:checked+.ot-switch .ot-switch-nob {
    background-color: #999;
}

}

right: unset;

label
    Digital Customs Invoice Terms and Conditions

    Digital Customs Invoice Terms and Conditions

    DHL offers a Paperless Trade ("PLT") service, permitting shippers to send certain documentation accompanying the shipment electronically (eliminating the need for printed copies of documents).

    You, as "Shipper", are agreeing on your behalf and on behalf of anyone else with an interest in the shipment, that these Paperless Trade Terms shall apply in relation to all shipments sent using the PLT service.

    You further agree that these Paperless Trade Terms apply in addition to DHL's Terms and Conditions of Carriage and the DHL Express Online Services Terms of Use, as set out in the Online Application, which apply IN FULL. Your attention is drawn in particular to sections Unacceptable Shipments, Shipper’s Warranties and Indemnities and DHL's Liability of DHL's Terms and Conditions of Carriage.

    DHL will provide you with instructions on use of the PLT service. These apply in addition to any existing requirements on tendering of the shipment and the transport document. This will include:

    • the format in which you will send the electronic files,
    • the quality requirements for any scanning of documentation,
    • the timing of shipment data transmission,
    • the details of where shipment paperwork is to be transmitted to,
    • the shipment details (ex origins, destinations, contents, shipment value) for which the PLT service is not available,
    • any documentation (such as a certificate of origin) which needs also to be provided in hard copy format when the shipment is tendered to DHL

    You agree to comply with all DHL instructions concerning the PLT service. You further agree to comply with any legal or customs requirements concerning the PLT service, so that for example, you will not use the PLT service for any shipments for which legal or customs requirements oblige hard copy documents to be sent.

    You confirm that you are authorized to send data electronically. You authorize DHL to use the data you transfer to DHL electronically for the purposes of processing and sending the PLT shipments. This includes your company letterhead and electronic signature.

    All documentation sent electronically must be legible.

    You agree to indemnify and hold DHL harmless from any loss, damage or delay resulting from any breach of the Terms and Conditions of Carriage or these Paperless Trade Terms.

    You confirm the consent of the receiver to the use of the PLT service.

    Please wait

/* === Template 12 Portal Form === */
.portal-form-wrapper { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; }
.portal-row { display: flex; gap: 16px; }
.portal-row > .portal-half { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.portal-full { width: 100%; }
.portal-field input,
.portal-field select {
  width: 100%;
  height: 48px;
  padding: 0 12px;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 48px;
  border: 1px solid #8c8c8c;
  border-radius: 4px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: Delivery, Verdana, sans-serif;
  color: #333;
  background: #fff;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color 0.15s;
}
.portal-field input:focus,
.portal-field select:focus {
  border-color: #0056a2;
  border-width: 2px;
}
.portal-field input::placeholder {
  color: #8c8c8c;
  font-size: 16px;
  opacity: 1;
}
.portal-field select {
  appearance: auto;
  -webkit-appearance: auto;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.portal-field select:invalid {
  color: #8c8c8c;
}
.portal-field select option {
  color: #333;
}
.portal-field select option:disabled {
  color: #8c8c8c;
}

/* === 3-Step Indicator Fixes === */
.sc-a0d4f61e-0.jleSta { gap: 40px; }
.sc-a0d4f61e-3.hxWmwJ,
.sc-a0d4f61e-3.hNXTrP { width: 110px; font-size: 13px; }
.sc-a0d4f61e-4.cVyzyX { width: 80px; left: 60px; }
/* Done step (checkmark, green bg) */
.step-done { background-color: #4caf50 !important; border: none !important; color: #fff !important; }

/* === Portal Step Indicator === */
.sc-a0d4f61e-0 { display: none !important; }
.portal-steps {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-start;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0 auto 28px;
  padding: 0 10px;
  box-sizing: border-box;
}
.portal-step {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  min-width: 90px;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(8px);
  animation: stepFadeIn 0.5s ease forwards;
}
.portal-step:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
.portal-step:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }
.portal-step:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.5s; }
@keyframes stepFadeIn {
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

/* Circle */
.portal-step-circle {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 700;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.portal-step-circle.active {
  background: #333;
  color: #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(51, 51, 51, 0.15);
}
.portal-step-circle.done {
  background: #4caf50;
  color: #fff;
}
.portal-step-circle.upcoming {
  background: #fff;
  color: #999;
  border: 2px solid #ddd;
}

/* Label */
.portal-step-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #555;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 8px;
  line-height: 1.3;
  max-width: 110px;
  font-family: Delivery, Verdana, sans-serif;
}
.portal-step.active .portal-step-label { color: #333; font-weight: 700; }
.portal-step.done .portal-step-label { color: #4caf50; }
.portal-step.upcoming .portal-step-label { color: #bbb; }

/* Connector line */
.portal-step-line {
  flex: 1;
  height: 3px;
  min-width: 40px;
  max-width: 80px;
  background: #e5e5e5;
  margin-top: 19px;
  border-radius: 2px;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: lineFadeIn 0.4s ease forwards;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.portal-step-line:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
.portal-step-line:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
@keyframes lineFadeIn {
  to { opacity: 1; }
}
.portal-step-line.done {
  background: #4caf50;
}
.portal-step-line.done::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0; left: 0; bottom: 0;
  width: 100%;
  background: #4caf50;
  animation: lineGrow 0.6s ease forwards;
  animation-delay: 0.3s;
  transform-origin: left;
  transform: scaleX(0);
}
@keyframes lineGrow {
  to { transform: scaleX(1); }
}

/* === Form Field Labels & Spacing === */
.portal-form-wrapper {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  gap: 20px !important;
}
.portal-row {
  gap: 16px !important;
}
.portal-field {
  position: relative;
}
.portal-field label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #374151;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  font-family: Delivery, Verdana, sans-serif;
}
.portal-field input,
.portal-field select {
  height: 48px !important;
  padding: 0 14px !important;
  font-size: 15px !important;
  border: 1.5px solid #d1d5db !important;
  border-radius: 8px !important;
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease !important;
}
.portal-field input:focus,
.portal-field select:focus {
  border-color: #d40511 !important;
  border-width: 1.5px !important;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(212, 5, 17, 0.08) !important;
}
.portal-field input::placeholder {
  color: #9ca3af !important;
}
/* Card wrapper breathing room */
.sc-63900b0f-1 {
  padding: 10px 0 !important;
}
/* Heading spacing */
.sc-ac4a4da6-5 {
  margin-bottom: 24px !important;
}

/* === CTA Button === */
.portal-cta-btn {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  padding: 15px;
  margin-top: 10px;
  background: #d40511;
  color: #fff !important;
  font-size: 17px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-align: center;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  cursor: pointer;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: Delivery, Verdana, sans-serif;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s;
}
.portal-cta-btn:hover {
  background: #b00410;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}
.portal-cta-btn:active {
  transform: translateY(0);
}

/* === Thank You Page === */
.ty-container {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 20px 20px 40px;
  font-family: Delivery, Verdana, sans-serif;
}

/* Checkmark circle */
.ty-check-circle {
  margin: 0 auto 20px;
  transform: scale(0);
  animation: checkPop 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) forwards 0.3s;
}
@keyframes checkPop {
  to { transform: scale(1); }
}

/* Text */
.ty-title {
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #4caf50;
  margin: 0 0 10px;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: tyFadeUp 0.5s ease forwards 0.5s;
}
.ty-sub {
  font-size: 15px;
  color: #666;
  margin: 0 0 28px;
  line-height: 1.5;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: tyFadeUp 0.5s ease forwards 0.7s;
}
@keyframes tyFadeUp {
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
.ty-title, .ty-sub {
  transform: translateY(10px);
}

/* Info card */
.ty-info {
  background: #f9fafb;
  border: 1px solid #eee;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 20px 24px;
  max-width: 380px;
  margin: 0 auto 24px;
  text-align: left;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: tyFadeUp 0.5s ease forwards 0.9s;
  transform: translateY(10px);
}
.ty-info-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 6px 0;
  font-size: 13px;
}
.ty-info-label {
  color: #999;
}
.ty-info-value {
  color: #333;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.ty-info-divider {
  border-top: 1px solid #eee;
  margin: 8px 0;
}

/* Done note */
.ty-note {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #aaa;
  margin: 0;
  opacity: 0;
  animation: tyFadeUp 0.5s ease forwards 1.1s;
  transform: translateY(10px);
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk a:hover {
    background-color: transparent;
    color: #F91320 !important;
    decoration:none !important;
}


#onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link {
    background-color: transparent;
    color: #D40511 !important;
    decoration:none;
}

#onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link:hover {
    background-color: transparent; 
    color: #F91320 !important;
    decoration:none;
}

#onetrust-accept-btn-handler {
    font-family: Delivery,Verdana,sans-serif !important;
    color: #ffffff;
    border: 1px solid #d40511;
    background-color: #d40511;
    border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 1.5rem;
    margin: 0 0 1.4rem;
    padding: 0 1.54rem;
    -webkit-box-align: center;
    align-items: center;
    vertical-align: middle;
    letter-spacing: normal;
    min-height: 4.2rem;
    overflow: hidden;
    -webkit-box-pack: center;
    justify-content: center;
    text-align: center;
    margin-left: 10px;  
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk button:hover {
    background-color: transparent;
    border-color: transparent;
    color: #FFFFFF;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .button-theme:hover {
background-color: #F91320;
    border-color: #F91320;
    color: #FFFFFF;
}


#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk .accordion-text, #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk .accordion-text .cookie-subgroup-toggle .ot-switch.toggle {
    background-color: #333333 !important;
}

/* Hide 'Allow All' on Host level */
#onetrust-pc-sdk #select-all-container .ot-checkbox {
    display: none;
}
/* Color Always Active */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-vs-list .ot-always-active, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-cat-grp .ot-always-active{
    font-size: .88em;
    line-height: 1.4;
    position: relative;
    top: 5px;
    color: #d40511;
    }

/* Color Optin Toggle active */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .switch-checkbox:checked+.ot-switch-label {
    transition: all .2s ease-in 0s;
    -moz-transition: all .2s ease-in 0s;
    -o-transition: all .2s ease-in 0s;
    -webkit-transition: all .2s ease-in 0s;
    border: 1px solid #D40511;
}


/* Color Optin Toggle */
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-tgl input:checked+.ot-switch .ot-switch-nob:before {
    background-color: #F91320;
}

/*#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-tgl input:focus+.ot-switch .ot-switch-nob {
outline-style: none !important;
border: none !important;
}*/

#onetrust-pc-sdk .host-option-group .vendor-host {
    border: none;
    font-size: .8em;
    color: #333333 !important;
    display: inline-block;
    width: calc(100% - 20px);
    padding: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    background-color: #f8f8f8;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-pc-footer-logo {
    display: inline-block;
    width: calc(100% - 15px);
    margin-right: 15px;
    margin-top: 15px;
    display: none;
}

/*#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-ven-item>button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-host-item>button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-accordion-layout.ot-cat-item>button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-acc-cntr>button:focus,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk *:focus, #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-vlst-cntr > a:focus {
outline: none !important;
}*/
#onetrust-consent-sdk .privacy-notice-link {
    display: inline-block !important;
    margin-right: 20px;
}
#onetrust-banner-sdk a:hover, #onetrust-pc-sdk a:hover, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy a:hover {
color: red !important;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk button.onetrust-vendors-list-handler {
text-decoration: underline;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk button.onetrust-vendors-list-handler:hover {
color: red !important;
}

#ot-sdk-cookie-policy a {
text-decoration: none;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .category-vendors-list-handler, #onetrust-pc-sdk .category-host-list-handler:hover {
font-size: .813em !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-button:focus, #onetrust-banner-sdk :not(.ot-leg-btn-container)>button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-sdk-button:focus, #onetrust-pc-sdk :not(.ot-leg-btn-container)>button:focus, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy .ot-sdk-button:focus, #ot-sdk-cookie-policy :not(.ot-leg-btn-container)>button:focus {
outline: none !important;
}


/* scroll change start */
@media screen and (max-width: 600px) {
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-pc-footer {
position: relative;
border-top: none;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk {
overflow-y: scroll;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-pc-content, #onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-pc-lst {
    position: relative;
    top: 0;
    overflow: visible;
    height: calc(100% - 175px);
    overflow-y: scroll;
}
}
/* scroll change end */

.ot-floating-button {
display: none;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-pc-content.ot-pc-scrollbar {
    bottom: 62px;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-btn-container button {
    margin-top: 7px;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-pc-logo {
    height: 22px;
    width: auto;    
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk #close-pc-btn-handler.ot-close-icon {
        top: 0;
}

li.ot-host-item {
display: inherit !important;
}
li.ot-host-item:after,
li.ot-host-info:after{
display: none;
}

#ot-pc-desc a {
text-decoration: underline !important;
}
#ot-pc-desc a:hover {
text-decoration: none !important;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href], #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href] font, #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-link-btn {

    Digital Customs Invoice Terms and Conditions

    Digital Customs Invoice Terms and Conditions

    DHL offers a Paperless Trade ("PLT") service, permitting shippers to send certain documentation accompanying the shipment electronically (eliminating the need for printed copies of documents).

    You, as "Shipper", are agreeing on your behalf and on behalf of anyone else with an interest in the shipment, that these Paperless Trade Terms shall apply in relation to all shipments sent using the PLT service.

    You further agree that these Paperless Trade Terms apply in addition to DHL's Terms and Conditions of Carriage and the DHL Express Online Services Terms of Use, as set out in the Online Application, which apply IN FULL. Your attention is drawn in particular to sections Unacceptable Shipments, Shipper’s Warranties and Indemnities and DHL's Liability of DHL's Terms and Conditions of Carriage.

    DHL will provide you with instructions on use of the PLT service. These apply in addition to any existing requirements on tendering of the shipment and the transport document. This will include:

    • the format in which you will send the electronic files,
    • the quality requirements for any scanning of documentation,
    • the timing of shipment data transmission,
    • the details of where shipment paperwork is to be transmitted to,
    • the shipment details (ex origins, destinations, contents, shipment value) for which the PLT service is not available,
    • any documentation (such as a certificate of origin) which needs also to be provided in hard copy format when the shipment is tendered to DHL

    You agree to comply with all DHL instructions concerning the PLT service. You further agree to comply with any legal or customs requirements concerning the PLT service, so that for example, you will not use the PLT service for any shipments for which legal or customs requirements oblige hard copy documents to be sent.

    You confirm that you are authorized to send data electronically. You authorize DHL to use the data you transfer to DHL electronically for the purposes of processing and sending the PLT shipments. This includes your company letterhead and electronic signature.

    All documentation sent electronically must be legible.

    You agree to indemnify and hold DHL harmless from any loss, damage or delay resulting from any breach of the Terms and Conditions of Carriage or these Paperless Trade Terms.

    You confirm the consent of the receiver to the use of the PLT service.
